creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
patch has issues

1) there's no new distfile
2) GH_PROJECT line is redundant
3) it's a new version, there should be a poudriere or synth log to prove the pkg-plist is still good and there are no other stage-qa issues
4) it should contain the WWW changes, not have a separate PR for that.

As is, this patch can't be accepted.
